hub_subtitle: English to introduce yourself and welcome international colleagues in the world of coffee

lesson.menu_title: Who Is Carlos? Diagnostic & First Hello
lesson.menu_desc: Introducing yourself and welcoming an international colleague at Sucafina -- 27 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 1 -- Diagnostic Session and Your First Introduction in Coffee
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Carlos Eduardo | Aula 1 -- Diagnostic

listenings.text: Good morning, everyone, and welcome to the Sucafina alignment meeting. Today we talk about the coffee season and the sustainability projects for this year. We have a special guest today, a colleague from another country. Please say your name and your role at the start. The meeting is on Zoom, so speak slowly and clearly. Thank you, and welcome.

Hi Carlos, this is a quick message before the meeting. We have a guest today, a colleague from the Switzerland office. She is very kind. Please welcome her and say your name and your role. You are the sustainability analyst, so you present the coffee project. Good luck, and see you on Zoom.

extra_audio.text: Carlos welcomes the visitor to the meeting. He says his name and his role. Emma says she is a colleague from the Switzerland office. They talk about coffee and sustainability. They say nice to meet you and start the meeting.
